ops.title: Ship captain-hook contract release: attach-only pack contract, pack lint, version floor
ops.description: Plan step 1 of the pack-attach redesign (plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/https-github-com-yasyf-getaway-blob-main-quizzical-comet.md). Version the plugin + cut captain-hook--v{version} tags, add `capt-hook pack lint`, registration guard for async decision gates, attach hardening (stable order, collision error), hook-state namespacing, once-guard shim docs + sentinel release on failure, wire cleanup_stale, delete byte-identical doctrine from docs, dead-code sweep.

ops.text: captain-hook plugin manifest carries a version and a matching captain-hook--v{version} tag is pushed
capt-hook pack lint exists, passes on migrated getaway/cc-context/cc-present and fails on a legacy run-entries fixture
full pytest + stress suite green; docs/guide/plugin-packs.qmd no longer contains the byte-identical doctrine section
PyPI release published and CI green
